name: GOUKEN: KONOHA DAISENPUU (IRON FIST: LEAF'S GREAT SPINNING WIND)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 2

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 18

Components: Mob

Make a Full Attack against the target. Each attack deals normal damage (unless otherwise specified) and gains the following benefits:

- 1 st Attack gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
- 2 nd Attack knocks back the target 5 ft once all attacks have been made.
- 3 rd Attack deals damage as though you were one size category larger.
- 4 th Attack knocks the target prone (Reflex negates). The target may choose to make a Tumble check opposed by your attack roll instead of making a save.
- 5 th Attack and higher will stun the target for 1 round (Fortitude negates), the duration is cumulative.

This technique does not grant you more attacks than normal, but you may use this technique as a free action if you also use the Renzuki technique, using the Full Attack for this technique.

You suffer a -4 penalty to Learn checks when learning this technique if you do not have the Gouken feat.
